violations.text: The concentration of the sink & surface sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The sani bucket was refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Debris was observed in storage room under shelving. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer, bakery pans) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Several food items in the bakery walk-in were observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The coving tile near the restaurant service doors was observed cracked with a missing piece. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the dishwash and service areas were lacking paper towels. Paper was provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizer buckets 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Sanitizer buckets were refilled at proper concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils the following were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: -bread pans -mixer bowl -potato slicer. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All itms were brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Pizza was observed held in hot box at 98 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Temperature was adjusted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Sauce was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The ice machine was observed in poor repair, with duct tape holding door components in place. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The display case was observed with an ambient of 48 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the. Inspector Provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -refrigeration gaskets -can opener base (bakery) -mixer bases. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The coving tile near the restaurant service doors was observed cracked with a missing piece. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Auto-dispenser at 3-bay sink was not dispensing sanitizer at the proper concentration (under 200ppm). Supervisor drained and refilled sink to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer, bakery can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items were cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Recently portioned roast beef was observed held at 57-60 degrees Fahrenheit and stacked above the fill line in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Supervisor had staff place portioned packages on a sheet pan and placed in walk-in to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Veggie burgers were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Veggie burgers were placed in refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -mixers -walk-in gaskets -can opener base (bakery). All items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Sanitizer was added to the sanitizing bay and tested at proper concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) in the bakery area were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided thermo labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of several refrigerator gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC stated cleaning service is scheduled for 10/3/24. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as banana peppers) in the 4 door stack refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
Leak observed under food preparation sink. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The kitchen hood vents in the bakery and culinary classrooms have an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights near the warewashing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
